easy.title: Easy: SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 3A Basics
easy.problem: Write a simple program demonstrating SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 3A.
easy.starterCode: -- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 3A
easy.solution:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 3A
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 3A' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
